functions.name: GEO
functions.description: Returns a KYTC roadway attribute (e.g. County_Name, Route_Label, Milepoint) for a given latitude and longitude.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (WGS84 / EPSG:4326). Kentucky: typically 36.5 to 39.1.

parameters.name: lon
parameters.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84 / EPSG:4326). Kentucky: typically -89.6 to -82.0.

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: The KYTC return key to retrieve, e.g. "County_Name". Use =KYTC.FIELDS() to browse available keys.

parameters.name: snapFt
parameters.description: Optional snap distance in feet (1–5000). Default: 100.

functions.name: FIELDS
functions.description: Returns the full list of available KYTC return keys and descriptions, fetched live from the API. Spills into two columns: Key and Description.
